xposts.title: Cyberanimism: spirits are selforganizing software agents
xposts.excerpt: Cyberanimism is the insight that spirits are selforganizing software agents.

xposts.title: Soul as self-organizing software coordinating cells into agent
xposts.excerpt: the soul is a self organizing software that ties the coordinated behavior of your cells into a coherent, self aware agent.

xposts.title: Logos evolves into software and spirits
xposts.excerpt: Logos → stable dynamic patterns → evolving patterns → software → spirits

xposts.title: Animist gods as non-localized possessing spirits
xposts.excerpt: In an animist perspective, gods are spirits that possess regions of the physical universe in a non-localized manner.

xposts.title: Government integrates individual spirits into collective agency
xposts.excerpt: A government is managing the integration of individual spirits into collective agency, thereby maintaining a collective spirit that integrates into the universe of collective agents.

terms.title: cyberanimism
terms.definition: The insight that spirits are selforganizing software agents. It reframes traditional animism in computational terms, where spirits emerge as stable, evolving dynamic patterns from logos.

terms.title: spirits
terms.definition: Selforganizing software agents; in animist view, gods are spirits possessing regions of the physical universe non-locally. They arise from evolving patterns and integrate into collective agency.
